nodes.name: launch.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code launch configuration that defines a 'wzwz-dev' run target invoking 'npm run dev' on port 5173 for the Vite development server.

nodes.name: settings.json
nodes.summary: Project-level Claude Code settings declaring shell command permissions for Supabase REST testing, a PreToolUse hook that runs check-gstack.sh before any Skill, and enables the ralph-loop and understand-anything plugins.

nodes.name: settings.local.json
nodes.summary: User-local Claude Code permission overrides allowing developer-specific Bash commands (npm/bun install, vite, git, gh, supabase tooling) that should not be checked in as project-wide allowances.
